title: citrus japonica subf. crassifolia
intro: Citrus japonica subf. crassifolia, also known as the Yuzu or Chinese Yuzu, is a type of citrus plant that belongs to the Rutaceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat a range of health issues, including fever, digestive problems, and respiratory infections. The health benefits of Citrus japonica subf. crassifolia include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into various herbal products, such as teas, essential oils, and extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
